persona.description: Non-technical clinic administrator who needs forms for patient intake. No programming or database experience. Uses Google Forms occasionally.

initialIntent:
## Purpose
Create a rental agreement form for construction equipment. Need to capture equipment details, rental period, pricing, insurance requirements, and operator certification.

## Audience
Construction company managers renting heavy equipment (excavators, cranes, bulldozers) from our fleet.

## Constraints
Must comply with OSHA equipment operation requirements. Insurance documentation is mandatory.
finalIntent:
# Construction Equipment Rental Agreement Form

## Overview
This form facilitates the rental of heavy construction equipment from our fleet to construction company managers. It ensures compliance with OSHA equipment operation requirements and captures all necessary information for a legally binding rental agreement.

## Form Sections

### Renter Information
- Company name and contact details
- Primary contact person information
- Billing address

### Equipment Details
- Equipment type (excavator, crane, bulldozer, etc.)
- Specific model and identification number
- Equipment condition at pickup
- Accessories and attachments included

### Rental Period & Pricing
- Start and end dates
- Rental rate structure (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Total estimated cost
- Deposit amount
- Payment terms

### Insurance Requirements
- Proof of liability insurance (mandatory)
- Insurance policy number
- Coverage amount
- Insurance provider contact

### Operator Certification
- Operator name(s)
- OSHA certification status
- Certification number and expiration date
- Years of experience with equipment type

### Terms & Conditions
- Acknowledgment of equipment inspection
- Responsibility for damages
- Return condition requirements
- Safety compliance agreement

## Compliance Notes
- All operators must have valid OSHA certification for the specific equipment type
- Insurance documentation must be provided before equipment release
- Equipment must be inspected at pickup and return
